sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Portfolio & Revenue Model
required_elements: Game portfolio breakdown by franchise and revenue contribution
Platform distribution mix (console, PC, mobile, web)
Bookings vs. GAAP revenue and deferred revenue balance
Subscription and Games-as-a-Service revenue penetration

sections.title: Live Service Economics & Player Monetization
required_elements: DAU/MAU metrics and engagement ratio trends by title
ARPU and ARPPU analysis and monetization trends
Player cohort retention curves and lifetime value calculation
Content update cadence and impact on engagement metrics

sections.title: Intellectual Property & Franchise Valuation
required_elements: Franchise strength assessment and revenue durability
Licensing revenue and non-core IP expansion opportunities
User-generated content economics and creator ecosystem
Competitive IP risk and franchise disruption threats

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/Bookings multiple benchmarking by franchise maturity
Bookings-to-FCF conversion and earnings quality assessment
Multi-stream revenue valuation (games, subscription, licensing)
Segment-level profitability and unit economics by platform

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Bookings deceleration and deferred revenue decline signals
DAU stalling and player churn risk in major franchises
Content pipeline gaps and franchise update frequency
Regulatory and platform policy risk to mobile/app revenue

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Bookings growth and deferred revenue forward visibility analysis
Player engagement retention and LTV vs. CAC sustainability
Content pipeline timing and franchise renewal opportunity assessment
